export class GatherProgressParser{constructor(){this._data=this.createEmptyData();}createEmptyData(){return{totalTimeMs:0,elapsedTimeMs:0,itemId:0};}flush(){this._data=this.createEmptyData();return true;}parse(wrapper){this._data.totalTimeMs=wrapper.readInt();this._data.elapsedTimeMs=wrapper.readInt();this._data.itemId=wrapper.readInt();// ✅ Optional: trigger custom UI event
console.log("gather_progress_update sent from parser");window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('gather_progress_update',{detail:this._data}));return true;}get data(){return this._data;}}
